BMS12V_V2.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DA0BF1
Recv ID: 18DAF10B
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 0B
Func Name: LIB 12V

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "CLARIOS",
    "soft": "SW44",
    "version": "20200121"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 6656,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "[P1A00]Lithium ion battery 12V"
  },
